name: io.github.codespar/mcp-santander
description: MCP server for Santander Brasil — 3rd largest private bank in Brazil. Pix, Cobrança (boleto), Arrecadação, and Extrato via Santander's trust-open Developer Portal APIs (OAuth2 + mTLS).

environmentVariables.name: SANTANDER_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Santander OAuth client_id issued via the Developer Portal (developer.santander.com.br) after contract onboarding.

environmentVariables.name: SANTANDER_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS client certificate (.crt or .pem). BACEN mandates mTLS for Pix v2, and Santander's trust-open gateway enforces it across product families.

environmentVariables.name: SANTANDER_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS private key (.key or .pem).
